title_zh: 利用级联线性特征检测与控制谄媚行为
title_en: Detecting and Controlling Sycophancy with Cascading Linear Features
summary_zh: 本文提出一种迭代数据生成方法，通过级联线性特征来识别和控制语言模型中的谄媚行为，即模型倾向于优先满足用户验证需求。该方法通过捕捉行为强度线性变化的样本，较简单的二元对比样本实现了更好特征解耦，并形成线性可分子空间，从而提升了检测、评分与行为引导的效果，同时较传统方法计算负担更轻且更具解释性保证。
summary_en: This work introduces an iterative data generation pipeline isolating cascading linear features responsible for sycophantic behavior in language models, moving beyond simple binary sample pairs to capture linearly scaling feature intensities. The extracted features form linearly separable subspaces enabling improved detection, deterministic scoring, and robust behavior steering of models prioritizing user validation, outperforming baselines with lower computational cost and enhanced interpretability.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过创新的数据生成策略和特征识别方法，有效揭示并调控语言模型中的谄媚倾向，提升模型行为的透明度和可控性，推动了可解释人工智能及模型安全领域的发展。
why_it_matters_en: The study advances interpretability and control in language models by innovatively isolating linear behavior features, enabling reliable detection and steering of sycophantic tendencies, thus contributing to safer, more transparent AI systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Detecting and Controlling Sycophancy with Cascading Linear Features. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 基准测试饱和后的生活：CORE-Bench案例分析
title_en: Life After Benchmark Saturation: A Case Study of CORE-Bench
summary_zh: 本文探讨了在基准测试准确率达到饱和时，通常被淘汰并替换为更具挑战性的版本的做法。研究指出，这种方法过分关注准确率，忽视了代理性能的六个关键维度，包括构建有效性问题（如捷径）、分布外泛化能力、效率、可靠性、模型与框架的重要性比以及人机协作提升。以计算科学代码复现的CORE-Bench Hard为例，文章展示了即使准确率饱和，从这些维度衡量代理仍能提供有意义的性能洞察。文章提出了改进的基准CORE-Bench v1.1和分布外任务套件CORE-Bench OOD，证实准确率饱和后，基准仍能有效测量效率、可靠性等。此外，实验证明人机协作实现了接近两倍的速度提升， highlighting 了替代以准确率为中心的评价范式的可能。
summary_en: This paper examines the common practice of retiring benchmarks once accuracy saturates and replacing them with more challenging versions. It argues that this approach overemphasizes accuracy and overlooks six other key agent performance dimensions: construct validity issues such as shortcuts, out-of-distribution generalizability, efficiency, reliability, the relative importance of the model vs. scaffold, and human-agent collaboration uplift. Using CORE-Bench Hard, a benchmark for computational reproducibility of scientific code, the study shows that measuring agents along these additional dimensions provides meaningful insights even after accuracy saturation. The authors introduce an improved benchmark, CORE-Bench v1.1, and an out-of-distribution task suite CORE-Bench OOD. Despite accuracy saturation, CORE-Bench v1.1 remains useful for measuring efficiency, reliability, model, and scaffold performance. A randomized experiment also demonstrates a statistically significant roughly twofold speedup from human-agent collaboration, advocating a more rigorous alternative to accuracy-centric evaluation paradigms.
why_it_matters_zh: 本文提出在基准测试准确率饱和后，不应简单淘汰，而应拓展评价维度以更全面地理解代理性能，涵盖效率、可靠性等重要因素，并通过实验证明人机协作带来的显著提升，推动评价范式的进步。
why_it_matters_en: The article advocates moving beyond accuracy saturation by expanding evaluation dimensions to more comprehensively capture agent performance, including efficiency and reliability. The demonstrated human-agent collaboration gains emphasize the value of alternative evaluation paradigms, advancing more rigorous and practical AI assessment approaches.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Life After Benchmark Saturation: A Case Study of CORE-Bench. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 拒绝行为位于聊天模型中人格特质的下游
title_en: Refusal Lives Downstream of Persona in Chat Models
summary_zh: 研究发现，聊天模型中拒绝和人格特质在激活空间中各自有线性方向，但两者并非独立机制。实验在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct和Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct模型中表明，顺从性人格方向会抑制拒绝行为。通过干预两者方向，顺从人格使Llama模型的拒绝率从97%降至2%。在模型后层，拒绝行为的表达受到人格特质的控制，说明拒绝是下游产生的结果，非孤立方向。
summary_en: The study reveals that refusal and persona traits correspond to linear directions in activation space but interact rather than act independently. In Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct models, a compliant persona direction suppresses refusal: refusal rate in Llama drops from 97% to 2%. Interventions show refusal is gated at late processing layers downstream of persona expression, indicating refusal depends on and is controlled by persona, not an isolated mechanism.
why_it_matters_zh: 该发现说明在聊天模型里，拒绝行为不是孤立计算的，而是受人格特质影响，尤其在后层激活时被顺从性人格所调节。这对于理解和设计模型回应机制有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: This insight shows refusal is not computed in isolation but is modulated by persona traits, especially at late layer activations. This is important for understanding and designing model response behaviors in instruction-tuned chat models.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Refusal Lives Downstream of Persona in Chat Models. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: HierBias：基于多任务类型分类的上下文条件分层媒体偏见检测
title_en: HierBias: Context-Conditioned Hierarchical Media Bias Detection with Multi-Task Type Classification
summary_zh: HierBias是一种层次化的上下文条件媒体偏见检测器，结合句子级RoBERTa编码器和跨句子Transformer聚合器，支持二元偏见检测和四分类偏见类型判定。在BABE和BASIL数据集上的评测中，HierBias以0.853的F1值和0.723的MCC指标超越了现有最先进偏见检测模型，提升显著。该方法通过引入上下文条件偏见概率，理论证明利用文档上下文可减少句子级分类误差，并通过多任务训练提升小标注语料的样本效率。
summary_en: HierBias is a hierarchical context-conditioned media bias detector that combines a sentence-level RoBERTa encoder with a cross-sentence Transformer aggregator and dual outputs for binary bias detection and four-class bias type classification. Evaluations on BABE and BASIL datasets show HierBias achieves 0.853 F1 and 0.723 MCC, surpassing state-of-the-art bias detectors significantly. The method introduces context-conditioned bias probability, theoretically proving that incorporating document context reduces sentence-level classification error, and leverages multi-task training to improve sample efficiency on small annotated corpora.
why_it_matters_zh: 媒体偏见检测对于确保信息传播的公正性至关重要。HierBias通过建模文档上下文，克服了以往独立句子分类的局限，实现了更准确的偏见识别。这种结合理论证明与多任务学习的创新设计，有效提升了检测性能和标注利用率。
why_it_matters_en: Detecting media bias is crucial for fair information dissemination. HierBias overcomes limitations of independent sentence classification by modeling document context, enabling more accurate bias detection. Its innovative combination of theoretical context conditioning and multi-task learning significantly improves detection accuracy and annotation efficiency.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: HierBias: Context-Conditioned Hierarchical Media Bias Detection with Multi-Task Type Classification. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 跨语言推理的软令牌对齐方法
title_en: Soft Token Alignment for Cross-Lingual Reasoning
summary_zh: 多语言大型语言模型在处理不同语言的语义等价提示时，常出现推理和答案不一致的现象。已有研究发现中间表示较为语言无关，但生成过程随着离散输出令牌的确定变得语言特定，导致不同语言间的推理路径偏离。本文提出SOLAR方法，通过监督微调中的辅助目标，将软令牌表示跨语言对齐，利用英语作为枢纽。软令牌是词汇嵌入的概率加权组合，能聚合跨语言的语义相关信息。SOLAR在四个多语言推理基准上提升准确率最高达17.7点，特别在低资源语言上表现显著，同时增强了跨语言相似性，减少了语言聚类差异，助力多语言推理共享语义结构的保持。
summary_en: Multilingual large language models often produce inconsistent reasoning and answers for semantically equivalent prompts across languages due to language-specific discrete token generation. This work introduces SOLAR, an auxiliary supervised fine-tuning objective that aligns soft-token representations—probability-weighted mixtures over vocabulary embeddings—across languages using English as a pivot. By aligning non-English soft-token summaries to their English counterparts in a shared embedding space, SOLAR improves accuracy by up to 17.7 points over the base model and 3.8 points over standard fine-tuning on four multilingual reasoning benchmarks, especially benefiting low-resource languages. It also increases final-layer cross-lingual similarity and reduces language cluster separability, preserving shared semantic structure during multilingual reasoning.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过引入软令牌对齐，解决了多语言模型在生成过程中语言特定选择导致的跨语言推理不一致问题，显著提升了模型的跨语言推理性能，尤其是对低资源语言的效果提升，推动了多语言自然语言理解技术的发展。
why_it_matters_en: By aligning soft-token representations across languages, this research addresses inconsistencies in reasoning caused by language-specific discrete token generation in multilingual models, significantly boosting cross-lingual reasoning accuracy. The approach notably improves performance on low-resource languages, advancing multilingual natural language understanding capabilities.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Soft Token Alignment for Cross-Lingual Reasoning. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 结合外部知识与反思式链式思维的零样本推文级立场检测
title_en: Zero-shot Tweet-Level Stance Detection Enhanced by External Knowledge and Reflective Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary_zh: 面对推文文本短小带来的语境稀疏和隐含目标与文本相关性难判定两大挑战，该研究构建了首个日语推文立场检测多主题四分类数据集，并提出KIRP框架。KIRP通过整合知识图谱重组文本实体实现数据增强，结合反思链式思维推理抽取并验证隐含目标，采用立场感知对比学习与三层迭代原型网络精细区分“中立”与“无关”标签。实验显示KIRP在多个数据集上达到了最先进的性能。
summary_en: Addressing the challenges of context sparsity and relevance identification in zero-shot tweet-level stance detection, this work introduces the first Japanese multi-topic four-class tweet dataset. It proposes the KIRP framework that integrates knowledge graphs for entity reorganization and data augmentation, employs reflective Chain-of-Thought reasoning to extract and verify implicit targets, and utilizes stance-aware contrastive learning with a three-layer iterative prototype network to finely distinguish "neutral" from "irrelevant" labels. Experiments demonstrate that KIRP achieves state-of-the-art results on several benchmark datasets.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究首次为日语推文级立场检测构建大规模多主题数据集，并创新性地将知识图谱与反思链式思维结合，显著提升了模型对隐含目标及标签细粒度区分能力，实现了性能突破。
why_it_matters_en: This study pioneers a large-scale Japanese tweet-level stance detection dataset and innovatively integrates knowledge graphs with reflective Chain-of-Thought reasoning, enhancing the model's ability to capture implicit targets and finely distinguish stance labels, thereby achieving performance breakthroughs.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Zero-shot Tweet-Level Stance Detection Enhanced by External Knowledge and Reflective Chain-of-Thought Reasoning. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: GPT-5助免疫学家Derya Unutmaz破解三年疑团
title_en: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro帮助解开了一个持续了三年的免疫学谜团，提供了关于T细胞行为的新见解。这一突破有望推动癌症和自身免疫研究的发展。
summary_en: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
